sections.text:
(1) This Act may be cited as the Presidential Emoluments Act.
This Act may be cited as the Presidential Emoluments Act.

The President shall be paid—
(a) a salary calculated at the annual rate of K6,161,963; and
a salary calculated at the annual rate of K6,161,963; and
(b) a special annual allowance of K4,018,269.
a special annual allowance of K4,018,269.
